records.ety: [Gr. <?/ scattered, fr. <?/, <?/, scattered, fr. <?/ to sow seed, to scatter like seed: cf. F. sporadique. See Spore.]

defs: Occurring singly, or apart from other things of the same kind, or in scattered instances; separate; single; as, a sporadic fireball; a sporadic case of disease; a sporadic example of a flower.
